Book a Table

Meat · Fire · Tradition

Where Fire Meets Flavor

Fine dining, crafted with passion.

Book a Table View the Menu

Our Story

A courtyard built around one tree, one fire.

The name carries an old Greek expression — "In the courtyard of the one apple tree" — used to describe a company so close-knit that they all fit under a single tree. This is the space we wanted to build: a fire, a table, everyone close enough to share it.

Chef Dimitris Antonakos trained in the charcoal kitchens of Thessaloniki before spending a decade between Lyon and Buenos Aires, learning how distance and live fire change the character of meat. He brought this knowledge home, combined it with Aegean ingredients and aged Pakistani beef, and built a menu where the grill speaks the loudest.

Each cut is dry-aged on-site, finished over oak and olive wood, and served at the table exactly as it came off the fire — slow, and lightly smoked.

Guest Reviews

Reviews

★★★★★

"The tomahawk for two was the best steak I've had outside Buenos Aires. The space feels like a secret — candles, dark green marble, nothing out of place."

Hassan RazaMarch 2026
★★★★★

"We had our engagement dinner here. The private area, the staff, the smoky old fashioned — every detail was well thought out. Worth every euro."

Aleena KhanFebruary 2026
★★★★☆

"The service was warm without being formal, and the baklava alone is a reason to return. A bit noisy on weekends, but that's the price of popularity."

Omar SiddiquiJanuary 2026
★★★★★

"This is the most honest steakhouse in Lahore — no gimmicks, just aged beef properly cooked over real fire. The ribeye is a religious experience."

Fatima NoorDecember 2025
★★★★★

"I took my parents for their anniversary. The staff remembered a tiny detail from the reservation note and built the evening around it. This is hospitality."

Bilal AhmedNovember 2025

Beyond the Everyday Table

Private Events

Our private dining room accommodates up to twenty-eight guests under the same low golden light as the main hall — secluded, but never cut off from the fire.

  • Corporate Dinners

    Set menus, audiovisual space, and private entrance for discreet business evenings.

  • Weddings & Engagements

    Custom tasting menus and floral design in deep green and gold, built around your story.

  • Milestone Celebrations

    Birthdays, anniversaries, and reunions — full buyout available for groups over forty.
